avatar.error_format: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG or WebP.

subscription.heading: Subscription
subscription.welcome_premium: Welcome to Premium! Your subscription is active.
subscription.free_upsell: Upgrade to Premium to access AI-powered sessions and personalized programs.

notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.description: Stay informed about what matters — never a daily reminder.
notifications.info_description: Program updates, account events, security alerts.
notifications.progression_description: A short note when you complete a step (program week, history milestone). Off by default.
notifications.new_content_description: Newly added recipes or programs. Off by default.

danger_zone.heading: Danger zone
danger_zone.description: Deleting your account permanently removes your profile, history, and personal data. This cannot be undone.
danger_zone.confirm_body: This action is immediate and irreversible. Type the word below to confirm.
danger_zone.bullet_data: Your profile, sessions, and programs will be erased.
danger_zone.bullet_subscription: Your Premium subscription will be cancelled on Stripe.
danger_zone.bullet_irreversible: There is no way to recover the data afterwards.

cgu_modal.title: Terms update
cgu_modal.body: Our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy have been updated (version {{version}}). Access to the app is suspended until you accept them.
cgu_modal.error_save: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.
